name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-39
title: Multiple tests create generate-skills-dir.sh inside tmp repos (violates Python-only mandate)
description: Four tests create a stub bash script named 'generate-skills-dir.sh' inside temporary test repos: test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG10-override.py line 85-88, test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG7-visual-messages.py line 136-139, test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG9-green-messages.py lines 145-148 and 163-166, test-RABBIT-CAGE-18-scope-alert-messages.py line 67-70. Spec Inv 27 explicitly states generate-skills-dir.py does NOT exist (superseded by build.py + build-contract.json), and the Python-only mandate (Tech Stack section, Inv 39) forbids .sh runtime files. These stubs are no-op placeholders left over from before the build.py migration; they should be removed since they are never invoked by current rabbit-cage code paths.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
